conbody.p: Managed services for orchestrating containers in AWS.

ul.li: ECS: Native container orchestration for Docker containers, integrated with AWS tools.
EKS: Managed Kubernetes environment, compatible with Kubernetes-native tooling.

conbody.p: Use Case: Deploy containerized microservices architecture.
Serverless compute engine for containers on ECS or EKS.

ul.li: Eliminates need for provisioning and managing EC2 instances.

conbody.p: Use Case: Run stateless APIs in Docker containers using ECS + Fargate.
